query: SELECT g.id, g.nome, g.convenioCirurgia, g.planoSaudeId, g.hospitalParto, g.procedimentoCirurgia, g.dataPartoProgramado, g.tipoPartoDesejado, p.nome as planoNome FROM gestantes g LEFT JOIN planosSaude p ON g.planoSaudeId = p.id WHERE g.id = 330025
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3v7At4WPQpm4aRf.9e6a8ae0e28e --database bSA4q7aMJsJeSmafooCq7A --execute SELECT g.id, g.nome, g.convenioCirurgia, g.planoSaudeId, g.hospitalParto, g.procedimentoCirurgia, g.dataPartoProgramado, g.tipoPartoDesejado, p.nome as planoNome FROM gestantes g LEFT JOIN planosSaude p ON g.planoSaudeId = p.id WHERE g.id = 330025
